name: freelook
description: Outlook desktop application powered by Tauri
author: Howard Ju <howard.ju@outlook.com>

scripts.clean: rm -rf src-tauri/target src-tauri/gen node_modules src/js-compiled dist build out release debug coverage tmp temp .cache .turbo .parcel-cache .next .nuxt .svelte-kit && find . -name .DS_Store -delete 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.clean:full: npm run clean && npm install && npm run build:ts
